criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence for photo and video editing features.
criteria.sources: App feature descriptions, user reviews, and official documentation.

criteria.name: User-Friendliness
criteria.description: The ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface and functionalities.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app ratings, and usability studies.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and versatility of editing tools and options available within the app.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, official documentation, and expert reviews.

criteria.name: Output Quality
criteria.description: The quality and realism of the edited photos and videos produced by the app.
criteria.sources: User-generated content, expert reviews, and sample outputs.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The availability of the app across different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop).
criteria.sources: Official app listings and developer information.
